verdict: A moderate-strength retinol formulation in a stable squalane vehicle, effective for those past the retinol introduction phase. Higher concentration demands careful introduction to minimize irritation.

_research.name: The Ordinary Retinol 0.5% in Squalane
pros: Squalane provides occlusion and skin-identical lipid support
_research.con: Stronger concentration increases irritation risk and requires careful titration for sensitive skin.
